title: relbunium hirtum subsp. camporum
intro: Relbunium hirtum subsp. camporum, also known as the Coral Bells, is a flowering plant species in the family Apocynaceae. The Coral Bells plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety due to its adaptogenic properties, and supporting respiratory health due to its expectorant properties. The herbal preparations of Relbunium hirtum subsp. camporum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
